title: Chapter 8 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 8 concepts!

questions.question: Dart's Null Safety rule requires adding what symbol to denote a variable CAN legitimately be assigned `null`?
questions.explanation: Adding a trailing ? on the type strictly marks it as legally nullable.

questions.question: Which keyword forces code execution to formally pause and wait for an Async Future delivery before proceeding?
questions.explanation: Await suspends that specific block's progress until the asynchronous operation effectively concludes.

questions.question: Risk-prone code sections (like network requests) should be wrapped in which protective block to prevent app crashing?
questions.explanation: Try / Catch blocks ensure unexpected runtime faults are caught internally rather than immediately shattering the active app process.
